name: Skadian Mail
description: Skadians borrowed the practice of reinforcing mail armor with iron plates from Jarimad warriors. Such chestpieces are more than capable of protecting the cavalry from stray arrows and spear thrusts.
descriptionZh: 斯卡迪亚人从亚里迈德的战士那里学会了用铁板加固链甲的工艺。骑兵穿上这样的盔甲，完全足以抵御流箭和长杆刃器的攻击。
